**Joe Biden and Kamala Harris will be the next President and Vice President of the United States.**

But to stop Mitch McConnell from blocking the Biden-Harris agenda, **we need a Democratic Senate._And Senate control is coming down to Georgia!_**

Team, this is our chance to turn the page on this dark chapter of American history and emerge on the other side stronger than ever.

We can unite to defeat COVID-19 and build a stronger, more prosperous, more just America. Our future is bright with Biden and Harris in the White House!

_But this fight is not over._

I have a chance to defeat David Perdue here in Georgia to flip the Senate.

**_AND I CAN WIN!_**

I won more votes than any Georgia Democrat in state history. The Democratic momentum in Georgia is unprecedented.

body:
I represented Georgia in Congress for over 20 years, so this is personal.
****
_****_
Peter,

Democrats' final chance at taking total control of our country's agenda rests on Georgia. That's why Schumer and the liberal establishment are already planning for Georgia's runoffs to be [the most expensive races in U.S. history!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56926637:s40cZzKN-:m:1:2247059263:E0D2DCEF07C3F3228C7CE72BACE003B6:r)

Georgia is a make-or-break moment for conservatives everywhere. Right now, Republicans don't have the numbers to retain the Senate Majority without winning this fight in Georgia.

_**If the Democrats succeed in turning Georgia blue, then we lose it all. Biden, Schumer, and Harris would change our nation for the worse. A Senate controlled by Chuck Schumer means a future of higher taxes, opens borders, cuts to military funding, the Green New Deal, and an END to the America First agenda at home and abroad ... **_

**We have****[less than 50 days](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56926637:s40cZzKN-:m:1:2247059263:E0D2DCEF07C3F3228C7CE72BACE003B6:r)****until the final fight for democracy, and without your help, we may not be able to save it.**

There's no question about it - we have to put everything we have into these races _before it 's too late._ [**Do your part by contributing TONIGHT while your support goes 6x as far >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56926637:s40cZzKN-:m:1:2247059263:E0D2DCEF07C3F3228C7CE72BACE003B6:r)

name: Nina Ahmad
subject: Giving Thanks.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for PA
body:
| | Hello Friends - As we all reflect on what we give thanks for on Thanksgiving Day, I am so thankful that on Tuesday, the Commonwealth of Pennsylvania officially certified what we have known for weeks - Pennsylvanians were critical in delivering the Presidency to Joe Biden and the Vice Presidency to Kamala Harris. I had the chance to spend time on the campaign trail with Biden and Harris team and I'm so proud to have played a part in their historic victory. I am also humbled and honored to have been named one of Pennsylvania's 20 electors to officially cast our votes for President-elect Joe Biden and Vice President Kamal Harris in Harrisburg next month. Here is the link to the electors: [https://www.inquirer.com/politics/election/spl/pennsylvania-election-2020-electors-who-are-they-faithless-legislature-20201113.html](https://act.myngp.com/el/BROwnzExIrZQpO_C-tCeayijSHv4elxEp22whDnte0o=/6oV5adbaPc9_fOPXqoSPN8OqavgKdwu2MrJ8aQ0e5UE=) This has been a long and arduous election cycle. While we fell short on our efforts to become Pennsylvania's Auditor General, I remain more committed and energized than ever as we turn the page on the last four years. The challenges we face are significant, but as President-Elect Biden says, there's nothing we can't accomplish when we work together. I look forward to working with all of you during this new chapter. Thank you for your support and best wishes for a safe and peaceful Holiday, Nina Learn more by visiting our website: **_[www.NinaForPA.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/BROwnzExIrZQpO_C-tCeayijSHv4elxEp22whDnte0o=/lcgAYEDt2khEuBB2MbksDvfsfvj--Y6XWGBopTCftbM=)_** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/BROwnzExIrZQpO_C-tCeayijSHv4elxEp22whDnte0o=/STNJofVFVvlR5qAsccgyoTNngf0taP3FdZYCYk4lDVY=) Follow us on Social Media: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/BROwnzExIrZQpO_C-tCeayijSHv4elxEp22whDnte0o=/oGDxUF-PubYb05u1q_cmhyVeQCgNuv6xCfeVBgFHrS4=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/BROwnzExIrZQpO_C-tCeayijSHv4elxEp22whDnte0o=/3fIRfowUD0CVZNgYCpAQD5SbqIaLtK-Mum8bL5zqwB4=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/BROwnzExIrZQpO_C-tCeayijSHv4elxEp22whDnte0o=/Snz4pC9SGmr8pbrGomOt-EyMYlnUrLIsfhumcDhB_WA=?hl=en)

name: Stephen Lawson (Team Kelly)
subject: ICYMI: KELLY LOEFFLER KEPT PROMISE, DONATED FOURTH-QUARTER SENATE SALARY
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE WEDNESDAY, NOVEMBER 25, 2020 ICYMI: KELLY LOEFFLER KEPT PROMISE, DONATED FOURTH-QUARTER SENATE SALARY
ATLANTA - In case you missed it, conservative businesswoman and political outsider Kelly Loeffler [donated](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nYB5YCmayJE10itTyYFYI3oQ4VNZieJvdPNSYhjEl5gqN0n45HNys0txinUAok8smr7LeDv7Ni-HGk5zq4VkANv1Ms5L-xHoGoL6tOPkF4f7phC-aEG7Myr82oV7w0ekncVtzvhxEX-GTZNVvUxnaXOxWuFMPplDTc8b9lX7MHhtaOZpOBDa_7CaCUB-_fa9CMEGSenwVKrP5fkmtx3CtkpG1d7CBgtEjtiAlTLAhHo=&c=DvLnkqcuOYSfC7MRMhEtWJsy5QohT7Wx2N71IHfFsaqXwY-Wk0neaQ==&ch=dHm2Pup5oGmzyPdnoqCBR6XAIJt1Q73NbC4IDe0JetwZopTLO-lALA==) her Senate pay to ten Georgia charities and nonprofits for the fourth quarter in a row. Yesterday's donations, to faith-based, agricultural, homelessness, and pro-life organizations, were made in keeping with Senator Loeffler's pledge to donate her full Senate pay to charitable groups and non-profits throughout the year.
From [Townhall](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nYB5YCmayJE10itTyYFYI3oQ4VNZieJvdPNSYhjEl5gqN0n45HNys0txinUAok8smr7LeDv7Ni-HGk5zq4VkANv1Ms5L-xHoGoL6tOPkF4f7phC-aEG7Myr82oV7w0ekncVtzvhxEX-GTZNVvUxnaXOxWuFMPplDTc8b9lX7MHhtaOZpOBDa_7CaCUB-_fa9CMEGSenwVKrP5fkmtx3CtkpG1d7CBgtEjtiAlTLAhHo=&c=DvLnkqcuOYSfC7MRMhEtWJsy5QohT7Wx2N71IHfFsaqXwY-Wk0neaQ==&ch=dHm2Pup5oGmzyPdnoqCBR6XAIJt1Q73NbC4IDe0JetwZopTLO-lALA==):
"GOP Senator Kelly Loeffler announced on Tuesday that she will donate her final Senate salary of the year to Georgia charities. Throughout her first year in the upper chamber, Sen. Loeffler has donated her salary to a variety of charities each quarter. Her fourth quarter giving includes 10 different Georgia organizations:

* Bartow Family Resources, Cartersville, Georgia
* Beacon of Hope, Johns Creek, Georgia
* Catoosa County Stocking Full of Love, Ringgold, Georgia
* Covenant Care Adoptions, Macon, Georgia
* Dream Weavers Foster Care, Alpharetta, Georgia
* Family Connection/Communities In Schools of Berrien County, Inc, Nashville, Georgia
* Georgia Junior Livestock Foundation, Winder, Georgia
* MUST Ministries, Marietta, Georgia
* Obria Medical Clinic, Lawrenceville, Georgia
* Stewart Community Home, Columbus, Georgia"

---
| ###
Stephen Lawson Communications Director [stephen@kellyforsenate.com](mailto:stephen@kellyforsenate.com)
---
|
Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler

body:
We need to hit the ground running.

**BREAKING: GEORGIA RUNOFF ELECTION TO DECIDE SENATE MAJORITY**

Friend,

We're officially heading into a runoff, and **we need to hit the ground running.[ This race will decide the Senate Majority](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nXlTcWuWSAp9LMSFrwlL7ld424U8Om9QB8OJbd4iOjz_JcT2aUQwYzIsxEfNYbozwH6hHFiuiCMsXtZnWFvWBmD4P2lH3O6kLgMrgAIUD2DcqT4kTlnyGPc7w2lJ9cftKprv8PnvHptNmlAjce0P-tov1EAFUFWv2VrZbFFWD5dvrZKCSWQTcsEYOAkgZgYNdXd-ytAR3YH4u6lKMRq5pcFhe9ojtuLoOXgs2dUmTTI1dz-cgSSNuZxoBMpT3gQu57WTl_6beW6z0keJrgFqPVQIRh0gM51ppJbZOJuD3BKAc5BwT-_x1Z4iyIbdYqfyV-SPg6t-lQ3mc_UkFQtjuX1jD9Zj6BcJ2Zy8NiXL3GMKuSp-F65s578g-YN2f3qbFLhHwfeGoKWg0GwK8vpFkA==&c=4VRGohtpp1jw0I_AfKeldKpUlr569lWn9xxoE75nzYI2HeUJUj_log==&ch=De50-mdzwtxXaBn6hTxWktj5ZOxBt-C6GG90hmzt23uBUYQwEoH58A==)**

First, I want to thank you for all the support leading up to this moment. Georgia's election results proved that conservatives across Georgia are behind us and our commitment to change the direction of this country for the better. After months of desperate attacks from my opponent and his special interest allies, conservative voters still turned out in force to send a message to the liberal Democrats:_that you stand with me, and together we will protect our Georgia values and way of life._

It has been a long, hard fight, and I thank you from the bottom of my heart for being on the frontlines with me, Friend.

**But, this fight isn 't over yet, Friend.** We have one last chance to SAVE the Republican Senate Majority and Georgia is our final line of defense against complete Democrat control of the US Congress.

From here on out, all eyes will be on Georgia, and **we must stand together to show that radical liberals cannot take over our great state.**

clean_body: We need to hit the ground running. BREAKING: GEORGIA RUNOFF ELECTION TO DECIDE SENATE MAJORITY Friend, We're officially heading into a runoff, and we need to hit the ground running.== First, I want to thank you for all the support leading up to this moment. Georgia's election results proved that conservatives across Georgia are behind us and our commitment to change the direction of this country for the better. After months of desperate attacks from my opponent and his special interest allies, conservative voters still turned out in force to send a message to the liberal Democrats:that you stand with me, and together we will protect our Georgia values and way of life. It has been a long, hard fight, and I thank you from the bottom of my heart for being on the frontlines with me, Friend. But, this fight isn 't over yet, Friend. We have one last chance to SAVE the Republican Senate Majority and Georgia is our final line of defense against complete Democrat control of the US Congress. From here on out, all eyes will be on Georgia, and we must stand together to show that radical liberals cannot take over our great state. The future of Georgia―and the United States―depends on this runoff election, and I know I can count on principled conservatives like you, Friend, to protect Georgia from the radical socialist agenda. name: Team Stanton
subject: Tell Congress to pass a relief bill before the holidays
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Friend,

Over 6 months ago, House Democrats passed the HEROES Act, which would provide economic relief to American families during the pandemic. Instead of passing this important bill in the Republican controlled Senate, the GOP have played politics and even went on vacation. **[Will you sign on to demand that Congress put aside partisanship and help Americans make sure they have what they need to afford to stay home and stop the spread?](https://act.myngp.com/el/BMvXniTZHOY0gnNdg1r8Hmn5npmLKJs3vYFNo4k9KwU=/7Nd4tyGhZEgnH2LDThQdXdgGno8J2XeToHOSxudhsqo=)**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/BMvXniTZHOY0gnNdg1r8Hmn5npmLKJs3vYFNo4k9KwU=/7Nd4tyGhZEgnH2LDThQdXdgGno8J2XeToHOSxudhsqo=)

We have to work together. That means we have to not only encourage people to stay home when possible, socially distance, and wear a mask at all times, but also provide Americans with the support neccessary to help them endure the hardships that this pandemic has created. To date, there has only been $1,200 in relief to millions of Americans. We all deserve better, and [**we thank you for doing your part by demanding that our members of Congress put people above politics.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/BMvXniTZHOY0gnNdg1r8Hmn5npmLKJs3vYFNo4k9KwU=/7Nd4tyGhZEgnH2LDThQdXdgGno8J2XeToHOSxudhsqo=)

Thanks for your support,

\-- _Team Stanton_

Paid for by Stanton for Congress
---
Stanton for Congress
4340 E Indian School Rd.
Suite 21-518
Phoenix AZ 85018 United States

Friend,

name: Marco Rubio
subject: OBAMA: Season 2
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Friend,

**We 've seen this show before. **

In 2014 under Obama's administration, Antony Blinken was appointed second-in-command at the Department of State.

Now, six years later, Antony Blinken is the top choice for Secretary of State. Radical California Democrats are FLOCKING to Georgia in order to influence our Senate runoff elections. And, if that wasn't bad enough, liberal Californians are saying that they want to MOVE to our state so that they can VOTE on January 5th. Peter, we MUST put a stop to this before it 's too late. name: True the Vote
subject: With Gratitude
body:
https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkY=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=326A748A20A3336

Dear Friend,

As we spend time with our family and friends on this holiday and reflect
on the many reasons to be thankful, all of us at True the Vote want to
take a moment to thank you, the volunteers, supporters, poll workers,
voters, and the citizens across the nation that have served your
community by getting involved in local elections. You are our extended
family, and without you, True the Vote would not be possible.

Thanks to your hard work and support, our organization has been able to
grow and expand over the last year, tackle bigger challenges, and take
on more opportunities that have allowed us to empower and equip a bigger
citizen army than ever to continue our ongoing mission of preserving
free and fair elections for all voters. Especially during these
unprecedented times, your unwavering commitment has meant a lot to our
organization.

For many of us, the true meaning of Thanksgiving focuses on the
relationship between God and man. Upon their arrival at Plymouth, the
Pilgrims composed The Mayflower Compact, which not only honored and
decided how to worship God, but also reflected the idea of law made by
the people. This idea lies at the heart of democracy and self-government
- the very freedoms and way of life that we risk having taken away
from us.

In the Bible, Philippians 4:6-7 reminds us that by continuing to live
our lives faithfully in prayer and gratitude despite the challenges we
face, God will take away fear and anxiety and replace it with a peace
that defies understanding. While the fight to preserve our freedoms is
ongoing, we must not be discouraged - the key to peace is giving
thanks!

>From the Pilgrims to the present, we can always find cause to give
thanks for the abundant blessings that come with living in this great
country. May God bless all of our families this Thanksgiving and
continue to bless the United States of America each and every day.

Happy Thanksgiving,

- The True the Vote Team

name: Greg Stanton
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Friend,

This year, from my family to yours, I wish you a happy and safe Thanksgiving. We hope that this year especially, you are able to reflect on the people and things in your life you are grateful for.

I can confidently say that my year would not have been what it was without the tireless support of constituents like you, doing everything from chipping in during fundraising, to activating your local communities to vote.

If you'd like to help local organizations with community food drives this Thanksgiving, please utilize the links below. Also, please find resources below on COVID-19 and protecting you and your loved ones during the holidays.

**AZCEND Food Drive**
[https://azcend.org/](https://act.myngp.com/el/dd_ckYFjpdMKdMnVufJK6U6dmgkuCeiuFGmjOMfsokg=/gbvTctLf-H2Uy59S2SpJf4O2sn0KfEkrOz9tSW-W4cQ=)

**The Society Of St. Vincent Depaul**
[https://www.stvincentdepaul.net](https://act.myngp.com/el/dd_ckYFjpdMKdMnVufJK6U6dmgkuCeiuFGmjOMfsokg=/8J7vsu9Pq6__lwGkNJkaw5ks5tLChj7SS5zyoUds4N8=)

**Phoenix Rescue Mission**
[https://phoenixrescuemission.org/hope-for-hunger](https://act.myngp.com/el/dd_ckYFjpdMKdMnVufJK6U6dmgkuCeiuFGmjOMfsokg=/zb34OLKGfJBEbigr0TodhFs3SDRrFwdMlwWzQsiZBe4=)

**St. Mary 's Food Bank**
[https://www.firstfoodbank.org/](https://act.myngp.com/el/dd_ckYFjpdMKdMnVufJK6U6dmgkuCeiuFGmjOMfsokg=/f2IlWMBxWkfDSWqrvKK52wRWic4UtWb2-U4T3EyiZiQ=)

_Thank you_ _so much _for all you've done for Team Stanton in 2020

\-- _Greg_

P.S. Get the latest information on Arizona's guidelines for COVID-19 from the **[Arizona Department of Health](https://act.myngp.com/el/dd_ckYFjpdMKdMnVufJK6U6dmgkuCeiuFGmjOMfsokg=/hlzPDnSmMXXHDViDZ39LcKsiPB6MrnDTKLP-xbvQYFQ=)** including daily tracking of testing results, and be sure to [**check out these recommendations for health and safety should you decide to travel this holiday**](https://act.myngp.com/el/dd_ckYFjpdMKdMnVufJK6U6dmgkuCeiuFGmjOMfsokg=/06WdSMJpPTzq8C1kKLGIwtLxZ7j_QC6cN0lxxASiwAU=).

Paid for by Stanton for Congress

body:
Friend,

**This is how the math adds up:**

**_That means Chuck Schumer and his far-left enablers can still capture our Senate Majority and reverse all the progress we 've made under President Trump._**

**_If Democrats take these seats, there will be nothing left to stop their radical agenda._** That's why the far-left is throwing MILLIONS into these races where Republicans are already being outraised and outspent. We need your help to close the fundraising gap. clean_body: %%First Name%%, Congressman Jeff Van Drew has a critical November fundraising goal coming up and needs your help. == Friend, Jeff Van Drew is fighting for a Strong America and needs your help to fight back against the Radical Left agenda that socialist darling AOC is trying to push through Congress. Radical ideas like the Green New Deal, Medicare for All, and DEFUNDING the police are the exact reason Jeff Van Drew walked away from the Democrat Party. Jeff has served South Jersey as a family dentist and local elected official for years. In Congress, Jeff remains focused on serving you just as he always has. That means fighting for your 2nd Amendment Rights, fiscally conservative policies, and holding Communist China accountable for the pandemic. Friend, Congressman Jeff Van Drew has a critical November fundraising goal coming up and needs your help. Even though the 2020 election is over, that doesn't mean our fight is over. == == Help Congressman Jeff Van Drew reach his goal before 11/30 by chipping in below! == == == == == Thank you, Team Van Drew | Would you like to stay in touch with Team VanDrew? name: Survey Team
subject: Mark Warner's 2021 Issues Survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
What should Mark prioritize in the next Congress?
|
---

| | Hi, Derek --

On November 3rd, Virginians made their voices heard and re-elected Mark Warner to serve another six years in the Senate. Mark is grateful for the support he saw from every corner of the Commonwealth, and is ready to get back to Washington to continue his work to make life better for _every_ Virginian.

**Mark is ready to roll up his sleeves and get back to work, but he wants your input. Please fill out our quick 2021 Issues Survey to let Mark know what you want him to focus on in the Senate.**

**[We need your opinion: Please take Mark's 2021 Issues Survey.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9ba/53d9897e/550a19a2/1c88d33f/1744273222/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-2021survey")**

subject: Derek, here’s the bottom line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Virginians for Common Good
body:
| | | Here’s the bottom line, Derek: **With the Senate,** President Biden and Vice President Harris will be able to lead us out of this pandemic and invest in economic recovery. **With the Senate,** we can strengthen Voting Rights and pass criminal justice reform. **With the Senate,** we can protect _Roe v. Wade_ and the privacy of women’s health care. **With the Senate,** we can invest in clean energy and save our environment. **_Without the Senate,_****we can’t do any of those things.** **** **[That’s why the stakes are so high in Georgia right now, Derek. name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Thankful for you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/E3QAwPHqdUDIVmgTIZfyx3ADqXrcB7HU7mfqi_ZM1jE=/J6wqh0zr1DGhkSySYb2pKL0mck6uvQglDnAM6ODferA=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201125-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

Just this month, we won re-election. As we approach Thanksgiving this year, I'm thinking about the immense gratitude I hold for everyone who made it possible with their hard work and dedication.

**[We share a core belief:](https://act.myngp.com/el/E3QAwPHqdUDIVmgTIZfyx3ADqXrcB7HU7mfqi_ZM1jE=/J6wqh0zr1DGhkSySYb2pKL0mck6uvQglDnAM6ODferA=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201125-1-EM&amount=25)** a government can and should work to create opportunity, advance progress, and ensure the health and prosperity of its people.

This year is unlike anything we've seen in our lifetimes. Despite the continued struggles, our country came together, energized and engaged, to fight for what they believed in this November.

**[A shared belief in community, in helping the most vulnerable, in uplifting our neighbors, in this country.](https://act.myngp.com/el/E3QAwPHqdUDIVmgTIZfyx3ADqXrcB7HU7mfqi_ZM1jE=/J6wqh0zr1DGhkSySYb2pKL0mck6uvQglDnAM6ODferA=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201125-1-EM&amount=25)** A continued hope for a more equitable nation, one that lives up to the high ideals it was founded on.

**[Peter, I 'm thankful to you. ](https://act.myngp.com/el/E3QAwPHqdUDIVmgTIZfyx3ADqXrcB7HU7mfqi_ZM1jE=/J6wqh0zr1DGhkSySYb2pKL0mck6uvQglDnAM6ODferA=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201125-1-EM&amount=25)**Your continued faith in this country and your ongoing support will allow me to continue to fight for every member of our community.

I know you'll be with us every step of the way as we continue important work in Congress. This is just one more reason I'm grateful for you.

Thank you,

_Abigail_
---

name: David Perdue
subject: RUNOFF - WE NEED YOUR HELP!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Perdue for Senate
body:
****

We need to hit the ground running.
__****

**BREAKING: GEORGIA RUNOFF ELECTION TO DECIDE SENATE MAJORITY**

Peter,

We're officially heading into a runoff, and **we need to hit the ground running.[ This race will decide the Senate Majority](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56934221:WofHsnKzN:m:1:2247059263:1E1B18A0FB7CA14BA3B63B35AB585C7A:r)**

First, I want to thank you for all the support leading up to this moment. Georgia's election results proved that conservatives across Georgia are behind us and our commitment to change the direction of this country for the better. After months of desperate attacks from my opponent and his special interest allies, conservative voters still turned out in force to send a message to the liberal Democrats:_that you stand with me, and together we will protect our Georgia values and way of life._

It has been a long, hard fight, and I thank you from the bottom of my heart for being on the frontlines with me, Peter.

**But, this fight isn 't over yet, Peter.** We have one last chance to SAVE the Republican Senate Majority and Georgia is our final line of defense against complete Democrat control of the US Congress.

>From here on out, all eyes will be on Georgia, and **we must stand together to show that radical liberals cannot take over our great state.**

The future of Georgia•and the United States•depends on this runoff election, and I know I can count on principled conservatives like you, Peter, to protect Georgia from the radical socialist agenda. **We are the** **last line of defense against Chuck Schumer, Nancy Pelosi, and Socialist Jon Ossoff. **

_**We have been MASSIVELY outspent throughout this race, and we will be again if we don't have your IMMEDIATE support. **_

**[Chip in NOW to keep Georgia Red!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56934222:WofHsnKzN:m:1:2247059263:1E1B18A0FB7CA14BA3B63B35AB585C7A:r)

[Express Donate $250](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56934223:WofHsnKzN:m:1:2247059263:1E1B18A0FB7CA14BA3B63B35AB585C7A:r)

[Express Donate $100](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56934224:WofHsnKzN:m:1:2247059263:1E1B18A0FB7CA14BA3B63B35AB585C7A:r)

[Express Donate $50](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56934225:WofHsnKzN:m:1:2247059263:1E1B18A0FB7CA14BA3B63B35AB585C7A:r)

[Express Donate $25](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56934226:WofHsnKzN:m:1:2247059263:1E1B18A0FB7CA14BA3B63B35AB585C7A:r)

[Express Donate $10](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56934227:WofHsnKzN:m:1:2247059263:1E1B18A0FB7CA14BA3B63B35AB585C7A:r)**

You--and all of my team's supporters--have been working hard since the start of this campaign, and haven't let up for a moment. We've got until January 5th in this leg of the race, and we need to put 100% of our energy and resources into _defeating_ Jon Ossoff. We cannot allow the Left to steal this seat and gain control of the Senate, destroying our great nation and everything it stands for.

We need to show every left-wing special interest donor that we will not let them hand over Georgia to the liberal mob.

**I refuse to sit by and let Georgia become ground zero for the Socialist movement, with higher taxes and defunded police departments. I am counting on your support to protect the state we know and love.**

[**Any amount, no matter how big or small, will go a long way in these crucial next few days in showing the far-Left radical mob that we will not back down.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56934221:WofHsnKzN:m:1:2247059263:1E1B18A0FB7CA14BA3B63B35AB585C7A:r)

The future of Georgia will be determined on January 5th. You have a choice between Chuck Schumer, Stacey Abrams, and Jon Ossoff's radical Socialist agenda and our America First agenda.

[**Chip in today to Keep Georgia Red!**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56934222:WofHsnKzN:m:1:2247059263:1E1B18A0FB7CA14BA3B63B35AB585C7A:r)

Thank you for all your support thus far. Let's finish this fight and keep Georgia red.

Thank you,

David Perdue

[****](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56934222:WofHsnKzN:m:1:2247059263:1E1B18A0FB7CA14BA3B63B35AB585C7A:r)

Paid for by Perdue for Senate

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Thankful for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
We’re sending The Party Line early this week. With Thanksgiving just hours away (and Black Friday and Cyber Monday emails soon to flood your inbox), I | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankfulforyou?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Thankful for You_**
We’re sending The Party Line early this week. With Thanksgiving just hours away (and Black Friday and Cyber Monday emails soon to flood your inbox), I wanted to share how thankful we are here at your Indiana Republican Party to have dedicated and loyal supporters like you on our team.

Since 2016, we’ve accumulated a record of winning that’s been unprecedented in the history of our party. Each year pundits have said we couldn’t go any higher and each year YOU proved them all wrong. Just think of what we’ve been able to accomplish together:
* 2016: First on the board for President Trump’s historic upset victory and elected our very own Mike Pence as VP. Scored historic victories for Eric Holcomb and all statewide offices on the ballot.
* 2018: We flipped **__the__** battleground U.S. Senate seat of the 2018 election cycle by electing Mike Braun over Democrat Joe Donnelly, and won all three statewide elected offices on the ballot.
* 2019: We won the most mayoral offices in state history and now Republicans are mayor in 71 Indiana cities and towns.
* 2020: Once again we were first on the board for President Trump and Vice President Pence. Governor Eric Holcomb won with the most votes ever cast for a governor in Indiana history. We elected Todd Rokita Attorney General, Victoria Spartz to the 5th, and expanded our supermajority in the Indiana House of Representatives.

We have so much for which to be grateful, but it’s not just the wins listed above. It’s the policies that come from those wins that are having the greatest impact on Hoosiers.

Its our low taxes, economic freedom, protecting life and our Second Amendment, investing in education, infrastructure, technology and health that are changing lives for the better in every corner of our state. That’s why we do what we do and that’s why we’re so thankful for your support and participation.

But, there’s more to life than just political victories. 2020 has certainly been an unprecedented and oftentimes trying year. Thanksgiving celebrations will look a lot different for my family this year, as I’m sure they’ll look different for yours as well. But even during our most difficult weeks and months, we saw continued acts of Hoosier generosity, patriotism, compassion, heroism, and ingenuity that have helped us weather this unprecedented storm. Those uniquely Hoosier qualities continue to make us ever thankful to call you all friends and neighbors.

And now as we look ahead, I look forward to our continued work...together.

-Kyle Hupfer
**_PHOTO:_**_ **Chairman Hupfer** and his family paused on a busy election night for quick photo with **Governor Eric Holcomb**!_
---
| |
---
|
---
---
---

---

name: Roger Misso
subject: This pandemic Thanksgiving: thank a veteran, save a life
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

Veterans and military families count their time in service by the number of holidays they've missed. I remember two Thanksgivings spent on an aircraft carrier in the Persian Gulf, standing the watch thousands of miles from home.

As we enter another holiday season, we find ourselves in the middle of a dangerous spike in the coronavirus pandemic. After a year of lockdowns and uncertainty, prudence to public health dictates that we must continue to distance ourselves and take proper precautions - even as we desire to be with those we love more than ever.

This isolation is also particularly hard for our veterans, military families, and active servicemembers. Recent studies show that we are losing more veterans to mental health struggles - and at rates significantly higher than before the pandemic. So today, instead of imploring you to support our candidates, we have a different ask:

_**Thank a veteran. Thank a military family member.**_

Reach out and show them that you care. Even if you're sick of phone calls or Zoom. This small act of caring can brighten the holiday - and even save a life.

Let's keep the spirit of Thanksgiving - and love for one another - alive despite our distance.

Happy Thanksgiving from the veterans of [Taking the Hill ](https://act.myngp.com/el/Cpd7CrM663kDWmOCIoZOqyOoN5oVBLGs6F63GgzfJgY=/a7KThgKo1fjLaFPbQuNHUv-InEZeN_sheOa_5Six4pk=)\- and **thank _you_.**

Yours in service,
Roger

_Roger Misso
Executive Director
[Taking the Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/Cpd7CrM663kDWmOCIoZOqyOoN5oVBLGs6F63GgzfJgY=/a7KThgKo1fjLaFPbQuNHUv-InEZeN_sheOa_5Six4pk=)_
[_@RogerMissoCNY_](https://act.myngp.com/el/Cpd7CrM663kDWmOCIoZOqyOoN5oVBLGs6F63GgzfJgY=/rcR0H64eKIXngqa6W6VTA4JT7FOID6ahjWJZHu4Jc3A=)

Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
---
Taking The Hill PAC
PO Box 2134
Bristol PA 19007 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/Cpd7CrM663kDWmOCIoZOqyOoN5oVBLGs6F63GgzfJgY=/DXEi8mFQs98M1LalaCHbV9J78kB8kmWQn_wyaPRb5vI=).

name: Chris Ekstrom
subject: Election Robbery in Georgia
body:
Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gPLKjiB.urcqI4c&b=7FdZ9LDLzg5sTF3cAJrwwA

Hi Peter,

My name is Christopher Ekstrom. I am a conservative, America First businessman, donor, and former Congressional candidate who has fought for the President's America First agenda - and right now, that agenda needs our help, every one of us

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gPLKjiB.urcqI4c&b=7FdZ9LDLzg5sTF3cAJrwwA
!

In my experience as a businessman, success doesn't happen if you don't show up and compete. You & I must fight to Make America Great Again!

At this present time, every donation is considered a weapon in our arsenal to preserve our America First Agenda.

You have to FIGHT for God and Country - for what you believe - and right now is OUR time to fight!

I am helping Drain the DC Swamp PAC to fight the radical Left in Georgia - so we can win TWO crucial Senate seats and stop Pelosi's and Schumer's radical agenda!

Our ads are in final production as we speak and depending on how much we raise in the next 3 days will determine how many ads we buy.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gPLKjiB.urcqI4c&b=7FdZ9LDLzg5sTF3cAJrwwA

We see now how frerocious the media and the Left are against President Trump and his agenda he has worked so hard to implement. They will stop at nothing to steal the election from him, and they will stop at nothing to steal the two U.S. Senate elections in Georgia!

Pelosi may be weakened, but she still has control over the House.

If the President's legal team can't expose the truth behind his election, then the Senate will be the only check on Joe Biden and his puppet-master Kamala Harris - and we need to make sure we take BOTH Georgia seats to give Mitch McConnell the ability to stop the squad's agenda! The socialist squad is bigger now - they are no longer just four people!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gPLKjiB.urcqI4c&b=7FdZ9LDLzg5sTF3cAJrwwA

You have to understand -

You must understand, that senile old Nancy Pelosi has no control over her Democrat caucus. AOC and the squad do!

Imagine what AOC will do with total power in DC to play with!

-Job-killing Green New Deal.

-Making working people pay for the rich to take "gender studies" college classes!

-Defunding the police so AOC's rioter friends can't be stopped!

-Instituting Socialism as a federal mandate!

This is no joke - the AOC agenda will be federal policy if we don't win these Georgia races! We need a Senate firewall - it is so important.

Soros, Hollywood, Bloomberg, and other far-left crazies are dumping millions into this election. That means we must meet his challenge.

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gPLKjiB.urcqI4c&b=7FdZ9LDLzg5sTF3cAJrwwA

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gPLKjiB.urcqI4c&b=7FdZ9LDLzg5sTF3cAJrwwA

>From FOX News:

A group bankrolled by liberal billionaires George Soros and Michael Bloomberg is pouring $300,000 into Georgia to back Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff in the runoff elections.

The Black PAC, which works to push black voters to the polls, on Tuesday reported spending $300,000 on canvassing for the two Democratic candidates. This is the first significant expense from an outside liberal group in the pivotal Georgia runoffs that will determine which party controls Congress's upper chamber next year. The elections are expected to garner tens of millions in outside spending from Democratic and Republican groups.

The Black PAC is heavily financed by left-wing billionaires, dark money, and the Chuck Schumer-tied Senate Majority PAC. It received $1.5 million from the Democracy PAC, a super PAC created by Soros, and $6.32 million from Bloomberg. The Sixteen Thirty Fund, which has been used as an avenue to push $55 million in secret cash into the 2020 elections, gave $2.25 million, while the Senate Majority PAC added $1 million. Other liberal groups, such as America Votes, Unite the Country, and various union PACs, have added millions more.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gPLKjiB.urcqI4c&b=7FdZ9LDLzg5sTF3cAJrwwA

Drain the DC Swamp PAC has helped good America-First conservatives like you and me for years, providing vital cover when Soros and Bloomberg start trying to bury conservatives with their billions.

The Devil is coming down to Georgia! We need to win TWO Senate races there to fend him off. Can you help?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gPLKjiB.urcqI4c&b=7FdZ9LDLzg5sTF3cAJrwwA

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gPLKjiB.urcqI4c&b=7FdZ9LDLzg5sTF3cAJrwwA

AOC will have a field day if we lose these races- she is the bane of our Republic and we MUST stop her!

We want to protect your Constitutionally protected rights, but we can't do that if Chuck Schumer gets control over the Senate!

We MUST win two of two races there. The stakes couldn't be higher. Will you help us?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gPLKjiB.urcqI4c&b=7FdZ9LDLzg5sTF3cAJrwwA

Your contribution is so crucial. Your $25, 50, 100, 250, 500, 1000 or more will send an immediate message to the Left

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gPLKjiB.urcqI4c&b=7FdZ9LDLzg5sTF3cAJrwwA
- that neither Georgia, NOR America is theirs!

The President is fighting. Our two Republican Senators are fighting. You and I must fight as well! Help us push forward and win in Georgia

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gPLKjiB.urcqI4c&b=7FdZ9LDLzg5sTF3cAJrwwA
, for America!

Respectfully,

Image

secure.anedot.com/draintheswamp/st1

Christopher Ekstrom

Businessman

America First Donor

P.S. Socialists control the House of Representatives and God only knows what they will do. The ONLY firewall we have against all of that is the United States Senate - and that could change if we lose on January 5th in Georgia. Donate right now to help us save the Senate.

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gPLKjiB.urcqI4c&b=7FdZ9LDLzg5sTF3cAJrwwA
We must elect Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue.

5 Halifax Ct
Marlton NJ 08053
USA

# [Clinton Judge Sides with Leftist Groups to Stop Asylum Ban for Child Abusers, Drunk Drivers](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52128&L=21318&F=H&)
The government is exceeding its authority for trying to ban illegal immigrant child abusers, drunk drivers, and a series of other violent criminals from getting asylum in the United States, according to open borders groups challenging a Trump administration rule scheduled to take effect this month. A Clinton-appointed federal judge agrees with the leftist nonprofits and has blocked implementation of the policy issued jointly by the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) and Department of Justice (DOJ) to ban foreigners with serious criminal histories from being rewarded with asylum and all the taxpayer-funded perks that come with it. This includes disqualifying those convicted of domestic violence, child abuse, assault, battery, identity theft, public benefits fraud, immigrant smuggling and driving under the influence.
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52128&L=21318&F=H&)

### [FARRELL: Potential Biden Buyer’s Remorse ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52128&L=21263&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvZmFycmVsbC1iaWRlbi1sb2NrZG93bi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMTEyNTE3MjEyNA==) The Daily Caller It has been hard to pin down exactly what prospective President Biden would do about the pandemic given the chance. Back in August, he said he would “shut the country down” if coronavirus cases resurged. Then in September, Biden backtracked, saying, “There’s going to be no need, in my view, to be able to shut down the whole economy.” Now he has settled on the talking point that he will “follow the science,” which is a non-answer because science can diagnose the problem but cannot determine the details of public policy. Setting and implementing policy requires less following and more leading. name: Gina Raimondo
subject: $100 million
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Deciding to limit and close businesses during our two-week pause was not a decision that I made lightly, but it was necessary to avoid overwhelming our medical system. Rhode Island's vibrant business community has already been hit incredibly hard by the pandemic, and we value their tremendous contributions to our state. These businesses are owned and staffed by our friends, family, and neighbors, and I'm grateful to them for working together with us to help combat the spread of COVID-19.
And as we approach our pause, our businesses and their employees must have the support they need to make it through. Today, I announced $100 million to support Rhode Islanders and Rhode Island businesses during this pause, and to spur economic growth beyond the pause and into the new year.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Q1d0U6Syfq9f0xu4HJf_rErhhJtYcG3EQjE9FScFr76NFqX0y8Ng0X4oUPBRMcd2gspXHn-63BGoHc_NGluyHKaH3Y7HuOl598tWqf-BKPTGTiG53NULPVl8qYRisvKkQ6bw2XWMYiSATaEwRlDYH-auj5TqJ-f2UBa4uAINLZ-4WuU_Ys8mrUh9EaewxGqoRKXb4c70r6Q=&c=4jcMpuk0RV5y-aSRk-l64NzSNJTkBZ_RSB6Xz9qp7S3cLcQDrm4i_g==&ch=-7Hu1obSU6jqQtFeYhfbXcgAGsGjirCc1V0KtPG1BCEZhtwhh8GLLw==)
---
| This investment is split into two $50 million categories: support for Rhode Island families and support for our businesses. Families: The first $50 million of our investment is going directly into the pockets of Rhode Island families. Every Rhode Islander who receives unemployment insurance benefits during the pause will receive an additional $200 for each of the two weeks. This is true whether you are already receiving benefits or if you file during the pause. There is no additional application - this benefit will be automatically added to your check. The Department of Labor and Training will begin processing these payments as early as December 6. Businesses: Another $50 million will go to businesses that will be closed or severely limited during the pause. If you're a business owner, all you have to do is fill out a simple form attesting that you have been impacted by the pause, and the Division of Taxation will send you a check up to $50,000 to help get you through the pause, based on your past revenue. The application will be available on Friday at tax.ri.gov and you'll have two weeks to apply. We'll start getting money out-the-door on a rolling basis as quickly as possible, even before the application period closes.
---
|
---
| The next two weeks are going to be difficult, but it's critical that we all take it seriously. I hope the programs we announced today will help Rhode Islanders and Rhode Island businesses make it through this pause. The most important thing any of us can do is to stay home as much as possible for the next two weeks, including tomorrow on Thanksgiving. Together, we can save lives and reopen our economy.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Q1d0U6Syfq9f0xu4HJf_rErhhJtYcG3EQjE9FScFr76NFqX0y8Ng0X4oUPBRMcd2n6oGYK86q55PXGgQXpV25w0ZQhR41eEz2AnN9VtbPmHV6Zaugu8KEeU6m0dxZapDv40lUag-S4qcOENkATs6NjF0vQfdVTrXJ0zFwNbe2WfCJDsQJEpjo_jlG0Lw65jHSOyCNNbTCZy2Y1Y-FnOT_C1nexujrCnr_gjiOw3vSpUtt3ERfao6Ik6xvNFWJEBi24Z-B72KxB_TjqZebzL_H2eb4lJ2GpZ0HkeBNA8OSvDklUnQpj1O16FlQ3vFpMwDZDm_8xIRtiE=&c=4jcMpuk0RV5y-aSRk-l64NzSNJTkBZ_RSB6Xz9qp7S3cLcQDrm4i_g==&ch=-7Hu1obSU6jqQtFeYhfbXcgAGsGjirCc1V0KtPG1BCEZhtwhh8GLLw==).
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Q1d0U6Syfq9f0xu4HJf_rErhhJtYcG3EQjE9FScFr76NFqX0y8Ng0aN7xOs10ya0lIjgM9dgu7VB3B4yXGfEeqEGxBG8vXwsK1424TMSoIBjrOAlc34gvdzRHj_6Pwyrkm-TzDv40tQ2nwylc5vpfq7pZHoHAeBqWjNt5GMhfjpD3eZk0Ys3MruWVe3aKWOK3Ux08lcxoFA=&c=4jcMpuk0RV5y-aSRk-l64NzSNJTkBZ_RSB6Xz9qp7S3cLcQDrm4i_g==&ch=-7Hu1obSU6jqQtFeYhfbXcgAGsGjirCc1V0KtPG1BCEZhtwhh8GLLw==)
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Five Stories President Trump Doesn’t Want You to Miss
body:
Media Said Trump's COVID-19 Vaccine Prediction Would Take 'Miracle.' They Were Wrong; Melania Trump Welcomes Christmas Tree, Kicks off Holiday Season | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8f0b64ab67&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**Media Said Trump's COVID-19 Vaccine Prediction Would Take 'Miracle.' They Were Wrong.**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ff49784e87&e=3ee4985eea)
_-Just the News_
President Trump made a bold prediction back in May: “Vaccine work is looking VERY promising, before end of year,” he shared on Twitter. “The mainstream media didn't like that prediction, not one little bit,” Joseph Curl writes. “For the record, Trump was technically wrong. There isn't a vaccine—there are three.”

**MORE:**[**Administration Begins Delivering Regeneron COVID-19 Treatment**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d527679c68&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| **[Melania Trump Welcomes Christmas Tree, Kicks off Holiday Season at White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0f2a703cef&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.foxnews.com/lifestyle/melania-trump-christmas-tree-holiday-white-house")**
-Fox News
“Melania Trump has ushered in the holiday season at the White House. On Monday, the first lady welcomed the White House Christmas Tree–an 18 1/2-foot Fraser fir–which was brought to 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue on a carriage led by two Clydesdales,” Alexandra Deabler reports.

**WATCH: [The official 2020 White House Christmas Tree has arrived!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c1dc5b18ac&e=3ee4985eea "https://twitter.com/FLOTUS/status/1330995640948682753")**
---
|
---
| [**Dow Tops 30,000 for First Time Ever**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=24ea05bbc4&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Breitbart_
“The Dow Jones Industrial Average on Tuesday rose above 30,000 for the first time ever,” John Carney reports. “The stock market has experienced a powerful rally as drug makers announced test results showing their coronavirus vaccines appear to be highly effective. The Dow is up nearly 12,000 points since its lows in March.”

**WATCH:**[**Market sets record for 48th time under Trump Administration**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6afcbd3bfd&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**‘Burn It Down’: Activists in Seattle Want to Abolish Police, Prisons, and Courts.**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=529abca740&e=3ee4985eea)
_-City Journal_
“American cities are entering a period of chaos. Protests and riots have dominated headlines, but beneath the surface, activists are launching an unprecedented campaign to overthrow the traditional justice system and replace it with a new model based on a radical conception of social justice,” Christopher Rufo writes. “In Seattle . . . it has also been adopted at the highest levels of municipal government.”
---
|
---
| [**Listen to the Science — It’s 100% Clear Kids Should Be in School**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=da39218ccf&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The_ _Daily Caller_
“Based on a growing body of evidence, researchers suggest that schools do not serve as hot spots or major points of spread for COVID-19. Instead, they argue the number of cases in schools reflect both the infection rates and social distancing policies of their surrounding communities. The data suggests schools can remain open to in-person instruction with adequate policies in place,” Adam Barnes reports.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=be701d1c0c&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0e57e8521f&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=fb5c747295)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Will you join me, John Legend, Indigo Girls, and more for a night of music?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
Help us get out the vote on January 5! |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4cb/34a064cc/1a5ae828/70225de/2957533100/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Friend - We all know what is at stake on January 5, and Fair Fight is working hard - with your help - to make sure Georgians are able cast their votes by mail, early in-person, or on election day and have their votes counted. While we're working hard, we can also have some fun! Friend, I'd love for you to [join me on **Thursday, December 3**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4cb/34a064cc/1a5ae828/70225df/2957533100/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiRTExMjUyMDIwUlRSIn0%3D/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rocktherunoff?refcode=E11252020RTR") for a virtual concert we're calling "Rock The Runoff" featuring performances by **John Legend** , **Common** , **Earthgang** , **Ben Gibbard of Death Cab For Cutie** , **Indigo Girls** , and **more to be announced**. **Rock The Runoff**
Thursday, December 3 at 9pm EST / 6pm PST
Tickets start at $5
[RSVP](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4cb/34a064cc/1a5ae828/70225dc/2957533100/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiRTExMjUyMDIwUlRSIn0%3D/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rocktherunoff?refcode=E11252020RTR") I promise you that this will be a night you won't want to miss. You'll hear exclusive performances from some incredible artists and hear from Georgians and others about what is at stake on January 5. I hope you'll join me, John, and more of my friends for a night of music and fun to support Fair Fight in our mission to promote free and fair elections for all on January 5 and beyond. Let's get it done. -Stacey [RSVP](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4cb/34a064cc/1a5ae828/70225dc/2957533100/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiRTExMjUyMDIwUlRSIn0%3D/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rocktherunoff?refcode=E11252020RTR")

Peter,
Republicans are on the ground in Georgia, getting out the vote. They’re doing their best to knock on doors and educate voters about the importance of the critical runoff election on January 5th.

_This election will determine whether the U.S. Senate retains a Republican Majority or becomes controlled by Democrats and their socialist agenda._ Please join the Republicans on the ground by helping us out today! **Even a $5 donation from you would make an incredible impact. **
[**Donate HERE to Keep the Senate RED!**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=640726c6f9024c498093faf88eb0b476&_e=WW4qw7-npIBnGIh6_Blyg1AO7jATWJU4FYyo3ZtQLU6B_ik0EsGHHoASQ95SDsIFmeBTlEEeCGXlInf__mKW9hHaeV3bhbU_4fpLAVRsTI_O7dNtGOfx1iPAkcXtuXffOXHGcL9omV30nnOWEQQsHsLUj44a78zgDwTniK3NGOao4fpP_Id_WsEsaZimbeKlazfIrRcCfglfiTmHHz9sZy00w89R6rNrZycUi1vibQFZxUIvTqac4K0_g3fkiugiGlwunxlk0_tLStjXXOQIwwjJ9R3RC9_cCSxkncnSWkCc17_FVA5PanwekPPFfQkDtRN3WC2JQTitC9P3OavGAJCV7dGBZZMUpJyTsTtsSislt6n2petiWovOfn14BlizTMtxpjE5fBL6It2kDs_Jkf2VMrnlbBGa75_-nD98XU0cS3xFY-FgtvhUjrojV8XS)
We cannot afford to hand over the keys to our country to Chuck Schumer, Nancy Pelosi, and their political agenda. Make no mistake, they will do their best to fulfill a socialist-policy wish list. They will cozy up to the Communist Party of China instead of standing strong. They will continue to ignore big tech companies’ violation of our First Amendment right to free speech, and they will make excuses and cover for them when conservative opinions are unconstitutionally censored.

_**We must fight for the future of our country. Join our fight today!**_
[**Donate _HERE_**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=640726c6f9024c498093faf88eb0b476&_e=WW4qw7-npIBnGIh6_Blyg1AO7jATWJU4FYyo3ZtQLU6B_ik0EsGHHoASQ95SDsIFmeBTlEEeCGXlInf__mKW9hHaeV3bhbU_4fpLAVRsTI_O7dNtGOfx1iPAkcXtuXffOXHGcL9omV30nnOWEQQsHsLUj44a78zgDwTniK3NGOao4fpP_Id_WsEsaZimbeKlazfIrRcCfglfiTmHHz9sZy00w89R6rNrZycUi1vibQE7qM_ZMbD21tqR24US70VDv_N5IrdhBoHfH8W4FUOMxts5zovF7VFQYwlQsWe_ehNIdEU423i4dDNMUGMryAcyT-aiI5FQcDIoWldrYpgmS1B3p4oYihVhf59C_drPzb_896-IBL69H7XwzLPF_u7Na5Hb6m5Is5aJqqt1BzuZstN-HvdseiwsibjsKTk7uLf9bSdIxo7uPu9riS1SdsPE)
Senator David Perdue’s opponent is funded by AOC, the liberal “Squad,” and with Al Jazeera — a Chinese backed media outlet. If Senator Perdue’s opponent, Jon Ossoff, wins this special runoff election, he will serve the interests of those who funded him, which means he will do his best to make socialist policies the law of the land.

Democrats are throwing a lot of money at these Senate races, because they know just how important they are to making socialism a reality in America. We need help from American patriots like **YOU** to fight back against coastal elites who are pouring money into these races. **Our country’s future depends on your support! **

**Please help us keep the Senate RED so we can continue to fight for the future of our country and save America from the dangers of socialism.**

clean_body: | | Peter, Republicans are on the ground in Georgia, getting out the vote. They’re doing their best to knock on doors and educate voters about the importance of the critical runoff election on January 5th. This election will determine whether the U.S. Senate retains a Republican Majority or becomes controlled by Democrats and their socialist agenda. Please join the Republicans on the ground by helping us out today! Even a $5 donation from you would make an incredible impact. We cannot afford to hand over the keys to our country to Chuck Schumer, Nancy Pelosi, and their political agenda. Make no mistake, they will do their best to fulfill a socialist-policy wish list. They will cozy up to the Communist Party of China instead of standing strong. They will continue to ignore big tech companies’ violation of our First Amendment right to free speech, and they will make excuses and cover for them when conservative opinions are unconstitutionally censored. We must fight for the future of our country. Join our fight today! Senator David Perdue’s opponent is funded by AOC, the liberal “Squad,” and with Al Jazeera — a Chinese backed media outlet. If Senator Perdue’s opponent, Jon Ossoff, wins this special runoff election, he will serve the interests of those who funded him, which means he will do his best to make socialist policies the law of the land. Democrats are throwing a lot of money at these Senate races, because they know just how important they are to making socialism a reality in America. We need help from American patriots like YOU to fight back against coastal elites who are pouring money into these races. Our country’s future depends on your support! Please help us keep the Senate RED so we can continue to fight for the future of our country and save America from the dangers of socialism. - Thank you, Josh Hawley | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate

name: =?utf-8?Q?Moms=20For=20Fair=20Fight?=
subject: Republicans Have an Advantage
body:
The ability to suppress voter turnout and effectively rig the election. | | | |
---
| [DONATE](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=3a9f2f8097&e=3f151f8b74 "DONATE")
---
| | | [ ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=305066e933&e=3f151f8b74)
---
The runoff elections will take place on Tuesday, January 5, 2021.
|
---
|
---
| Friends, Help us protect the right to vote. We can flip Georgia blue and gain majority control of the Senate, but it can't be done without our efforts to protect our basic constitutional right to vote. Our right to vote continues to be under siege in America. Republicans have an advantage through their control of Georgia statewide offices: the ability to suppress voter turnout and effectively rig the election. **This is why Moms in Office supports Stacey Abrams and Fair Fight to Protect the Right to Vote!** Fair Fight is a national voting rights organization rooted in Georgia committed to building a comprehensive program to staff, fund, and train voter protection teams in battleground states across America. The Senate runoff races in Georgia are going to be key to Biden having a successful presidency, but we can't do this without you.

Working Moms in America don't need another self-help book on how to lean in and do it all. We need common-sense policy solutions and childcare as a public service. Its time for our government to priortize our needs, but without the Senate, we will not pass these reforms.

[Chip in today](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=1348d02ce7&e=3f151f8b74). Help us take back the Senate by protecting voters in Georgia. Every Dollar Counts!

With Gratitude,

Simona Grace, Founder of Moms in Office

name: Powered By People (BetoORourke.com)
subject: A message of thanks and a call to action
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Happy early Thanksgiving!

We know that this is yet another holiday without hugs and meals shared
with friends and family, but we wanted to take a moment to thank you for
sticking with us throughout this tumultuous year.

We are so grateful for our amazing community of volunteers, grassroots
donors, and supporters across the country. Because of you and your work,
we broke records in voter turnout and outreach, made flipping Texas within
reach, and elected Joe Biden and Kamala Harris to the White House. The
outcomes of your work make us optimistic for the future of our country.

Thank you for being a part of that.

However, despite our gratitude and optimism for the future, we cannot
ignore what’s happening in our country today. COVID-19 is at a new peak.
Working families and small businesses are hurting once again. And the
stories coming out of El Paso are absolutely devastating.

We cannot change the deadly mistakes of the Trump administration, but we
can help our neighbors and do the hard work that our current
administration won’t do. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/44028?refcode=ema20201125-114205&t=1001&akid=114205%2E444211%2EEAzSsC ]If you can afford it right now, can you split
a donation between 20 Texas food banks to help our neighbors?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/44038?refcode=ema20201125-114205&t=1020&akid=114205%2E444211%2EEAzSsC ]Contribute $10

Thank you again. We hope
you have a restful and safe holiday.

– The Powered by People team

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1021&akid=114205%2E444211%2EEAzSsC

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
